ba_before_scene: Bare wall with rough mounting marks, exposed electrical conduit, dangling copper pipe ends with no insulation, empty bracket without unit, construction debris on floor
ba_after_scene: Sleek new split AC unit mounted flush on wall, insulated copper lines running neatly along wall channel, all connections sealed, condensate drain properly routed to outlet, digital thermostat showing 22°C
ba_room_context: Setting: Modern apartment in Abu Dhabi, neutral tones, natural window light, clean minimalist interior.

ba_before_scene: Unfinished AC installation — bare wall with pencil marks for bracket, loose wiring poking out of wall, copper tubing coiled on floor unconnected, old window AC unit removed leaving gap
ba_after_scene: New wall-mounted split AC perfectly installed, piping covered with neat PVC channel, electrical connection clean and safe, outdoor unit visible through window mounted on bracket with anti-vibration pads
ba_room_context: Setting: Traditional Gulf family home in Sharjah, beige walls, warm interior, family living room.

ba_before_scene: Empty bedroom wall where old AC was removed, exposed wires, pipe holes in wall with debris, unpainted patch from old unit, no cooling source
ba_after_scene: Compact new split AC unit installed, wall patched and clean around unit, copper lines neatly insulated, drain working with no leaks, unit blowing cool air with vanes open
ba_room_context: Setting: Compact modest apartment in Ajman, simple walls, warm ambient light, bedroom setting.

ba_before_scene: AC unit with ice buildup on copper pipes, frost on evaporator coils, pressure gauge showing critically low refrigerant level, warm air blowing from vents despite unit running
ba_after_scene: Same AC unit now frost-free, pressure gauge showing optimal refrigerant level in green zone, evaporator coils clean and cold with condensation, cool air blowing strongly from vents
ba_room_context: Setting: Luxury high-rise apartment in Dubai, marble floors, city skyline visible, modern interior.

ba_before_scene: Outdoor AC unit with corroded service valves, technician's gauge set showing empty refrigerant tank, ice crystals on suction line, weak airflow from indoor vents
ba_after_scene: Outdoor unit with new service valves, gauge set showing full charge in green zone, no ice on lines, strong cold airflow confirmed with thermometer reading 18°C at vent
ba_room_context: Setting: Modern apartment in Abu Dhabi, neutral tones, natural window light.

ba_before_scene: Split AC with frosted evaporator, bubbling sight glass indicating low charge, warm air output despite compressor running, moisture around pipe fittings suggesting slow leak
ba_after_scene: Evaporator fully defrosted and clean, sight glass showing clear liquid flow, cold dry air at vents, all fittings tightened and leak-tested with soapy water showing no bubbles
ba_room_context: Setting: Traditional Gulf family home in Sharjah, beige walls, warm interior.

ba_before_scene: Window AC unit struggling to cool, compressor cycling on and off, suction line warm to touch with no condensation, room temperature stuck at 30°C
ba_after_scene: Same window AC now running smoothly, cold suction line with proper condensation, room temperature dropping to 23°C on thermostat, quiet steady compressor operation
ba_room_context: Setting: Compact modest apartment in Ajman, simple walls, warm ambient light.

ba_before_scene: Ceiling duct system with thick dust accumulation, black mold patches inside duct walls, clogged air grille with visible debris, dusty return vent with dark discoloration
ba_after_scene: Pristine clean duct interior gleaming under inspection light, spotless white air grilles, sanitized duct walls with no mold or dust, fresh clean air flowing from vents
ba_room_context: Setting: Luxury high-rise apartment in Dubai, marble floors, city skyline visible through large windows.

ba_before_scene: Residential duct system with sand and dust buildup from desert storms, yellowed grilles, musty-smelling air output, cobwebs visible inside duct opening
ba_after_scene: Freshly cleaned duct system, bright white grilles reinstalled, camera inspection showing clean metal interior, antibacterial treatment applied, fresh air flowing
ba_room_context: Setting: Traditional Gulf family home in Sharjah, beige walls, warm interior.

ba_before_scene: Small apartment duct with heavy dust layer, grille blocked with lint and pet hair, poor airflow from clogged vent, visible mold spots around duct edges
ba_after_scene: Clean duct with strong airflow, new filters installed, grille spotless, duct sanitized and sealed, improved air quality evident from clear vent output
ba_room_context: Setting: Compact modest apartment in Ajman, simple walls, warm ambient light.
